description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a toucan, characterized by its large, vividly colored orange-yellow beak with a black tip and a white patch at the base. The bird's head and underparts are white, while the back, wings, and tail are predominantly black with a subtle blue sheen. Its eyes are ringed with a bright yellow, adding to its striking appearance. The legs are short and grayish-green, positioned to support the bird in a standing posture. The overall body is compact, with a rounded tail and smooth, glossy feather texture. The coloration and proportions are highly distinctive, making it easily recognizable as a toucan.
description: A striking toucan with a large orange-yellow beak, white face and underparts, and glossy black wings and tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the large orange-yellow beak, white face, and black body.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the black back, rounded tail, and the beak's width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the prominent beak, white face, and black wings.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the beak's width, yellow face ring, and symmetrical body shape.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid black wings and back, white throat and underparts, orange-yellow beak with black tip, blue eye ring
